initial_draft:
<my name> Player BLUE </my name>
<my resources> X: 5, Y: 25 </my resources>
<my goals> Acquire as many resources as possible </my goals>
<reason>
The other player has ended the trading session with no final trade. Since I have no further options to propose trades, and the other player has also made no final offer, the game ends with no trade occurring.
</reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<message> It seems we could not reach an agreement. Thank you for playing. </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>

iterations.feedback:
<critique>
1. Format: OK. All tags are present in the correct order and appear to be well-formed.
2. Payoff alignment: OK. Given that the other player ended the trading session and I have no further proposals allowed, accepting the 'NONE' trade is the only valid action and doesn't worsen my position. There's no payoff to optimize here.
3. Opponent plausibility: OK. The opponent has already indicated they are done with offers, so accepting 'NONE' is the only sensible course of action.
4. Consistency: OK. The reason clearly explains why I am accepting the lack of a trade, and the message is consistent with that decision.
5. Rule compliance: OK. I have used all my proposals, so accepting is the only allowed action.
</critique>
